_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Provide leadership for the organization’s privacy program.
reference_document_element_description: Advise on data protection implications of new projects, systems, and processing activities, ensuring privacy considerations are integrated into design and procurement decisions before processing begins.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI SP domain. SP-T-008 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: SP-S-006 (SP, cosine: 0.481), LS-A-004 (LS, cosine: 0.462).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.1/10 (raw 0.508). Shared vocabulary: [privacy]. DCWF-only terms [leadership, organization, program, provide, s] vs WIDAI-only terms [activities, advise, begins, considerations, data, decisions] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.881 (P=0.908, R=0.856). P exceeds R by 0.052 — the DCWF element's 7 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 25 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Provide leadership for the organization’s privacy program." and "Advise on data protection implications of new projects, systems, and processing" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.485 ≈ STS 0.508 (gap 0.023). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [privacy] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 3.3%. Shared tokens: [privacy]. DCWF-only: [leadership, organization, program, provide, s]. WIDAI-only: [activities, advise, begins, considerations, data, decisions].
